chunks.title: Woe and Prayer for Deliverance
chunks.reason: Combines a prophetic woe against the destroyer with a communal prayer for strength and salvation.

chunks.title: Judgment on the Enemy
chunks.reason: Describes the collapse of enemy forces and Yahweh's exalted judgment consuming them like fire.

chunks.title: The Future Glory of Zion
chunks.reason: Depicts the fear of sinners, the characteristics of the righteous, and the ultimate peace and stability of Jerusalem.
